textByHashes.ae322e27722b5492907efcd1985c9e69fc8c8976: H-hello. You l-look like a s-stranger to these p-parts. Would you l-like to buy something? I h-have some s- special offers at the m-minute...some s-sample bottles for s-storing s-snail slime.
textByHashes.a874241a4f72f5f2d2bb740e12590578839dc44e: (sigh) Th-that's okay. Nobody ever w-wants to buy my wares. Oh, s-sure, if it was food or c-clothes they would though!
textByHashes.21349af597052fd0a83fee30a1548637f0c23faf: As you p-probably know, the h-humans hate our kind and k-keep us trapped here. To get my s-stocks I have to sneak into the human lands in s-secret!
textByHashes.c171b357c5e36e56695ac53974f5270aac05b034: All the s-secrecy and d-danger has played h-havoc with my nerves!
textByHashes.01369500cb81f4daa593e088bb99c82dc0bd3cb8: N-not at all! They are v-valuable human artefacts smuggled here at g-great personal risk!
